## IDENTITY (generated from the DDL product registry — do not hand-edit)
product:  BlindSpot
wing:     Markets & Wagers
status:   beta
url:      https://blindspot.bet
auth:     none
stack:    Next.js
count:    tilt patterns = 12  (source: metrics.BS_TILT_PATTERNS)

## WHAT THIS PRODUCT IS

BlindSpot is sports-betting analytics. Track every bet, surface every pattern,
find your blind spots before they cost you.

The thesis: most bettors don't lose because of bad picks — they lose because
they never measure their own behavior. The edge BlindSpot sells is not better
picks; it is better data on yourself. Signal → structure → edge.

What it does:
- Logs every bet and reconstructs the record most bettors never keep.
- Surfaces behavioral patterns — including tilt — before they compound.
- Applies the D&A Analytics method: personal evidence, not enterprise data.

## THE PITCH

"The house doesn't have better odds. It has better data." Most bettors have
never tracked a single bet; that gap is the product.

## FOR AI COLLABORATORS

This is behavioral analytics, not a tout service. Never present BlindSpot as
guaranteeing wins or predicting outcomes. It measures behavior honestly and
reflects patterns back; it does not promise an edge it cannot evidence. Keep the
framing measurement-first.
